scripts.build: NODE_ENV=production bunup src/index.ts --format esm,cjs --dts --no-splitting --external @4lt7ab/core --external react --external react-dom --external react-markdown --external remark-gfm && bun build src/index.ts --production --format esm --external @4lt7ab/core --external react --external react-dom --external react-markdown --external remark-gfm --outfile dist/index.js && bun build src/index.ts --production --format cjs --external @4lt7ab/core --external react --external react-dom --external react-markdown --external remark-gfm --outfile dist/index.cjs && bun run ../../scripts/rewrite-core-imports.ts .
